methodology.storedFields: Headline metadata, source domain, timestamps, topic mapping and outbound URL only; no article body text.
methodology.verification: Confirm material claims against an official release, filing, regulator, government source or trusted financial wire.
methodology.ranking: Deterministic relevance, event-term and recency score; not sentiment analysis and not a trading signal.
